### Company

Our platforms secure all types of identity from AI agents to your customers, employees, and partners.

#### About Okta

#### Careers & community

#### Discover our latest stories

Careers

# Careers at Okta

As AI transforms the way the world operates, securing it becomes one of the defining challenges of our time. Okta secures AI by delivering the trusted identity layer on which modern technologies rely. Join us as we define the next era, one where security fuels innovation.

## Why work at Okta?

### Benefits [...] ### Performance

Okta’s financial strength, long-term strategy, and market leadership reflect a company built for sustainable growth—with transparency, global scale, and confidence in the future.

## We’re building a world where Identity belongs to you

The Okta and Auth0 Platforms help everyone secure and control their digital presence.

Vidyard video

### Okta Platform

Secure employees, contractors, and partners — wherever they are. Covers every part of the Identity lifecycle, from governance, to access, to privileged controls.

### Auth0 Platform

Built to tackle both Consumer and SaaS Apps across every industry. Authenticate, authorize, and secure access for applications, devices, and users.

## Top brands trust Okta

results.title: Intern at Okta
results.content:
### What type of roles do we typically hire?

Software Engineers, Software Engineer Developers in Test, Site Reliability Engineers, Product Analysts and so much more. Non Tech - Sales, Customer Success, Product Marketing, Technical Account Management and so much more.

### What makes Okta a great place to work?

We offer a variety of growth and development opportunities as well as networking and fun events. Each intern is paired with an experienced dedicated mentor, early career is paired with a buddy, that offers 1:1 support in addition to management.

### What are the requirements for Okta Internship and New Graduate roles?

We typically hire rising Seniors for Internship positions.

New Graduate roles require graduating within 12 months of the start date. [...] Annabel Filippini

Product Analyst Intern - University of Michigan

Background Image
logo

“I love working at Okta because of the talented and supportive people I get to learn from everyday. The mission of Okta to better the lives of its customers is truly inspiring, and the dedication and care of each person I have met here cannot be understated.”

Mason Stark

Software Engineering Intern - Universal Directory - Carnegie Mellon

## Our Values

### Love our customers.

We love (yes, love) our customers — and do what it takes to earn their love back.

### Always secure. Always on.

We build, educate, and advocate for a safer world, with pride and commitment to our mission-critical role.

### Build and own it. [...] ### Is the internship in-person, hybrid, or remote?

We hire interns in our key offices: San Francisco, Chicago, Bellevue (a suburb of Seattle), Toronto, Dublin, Bangalore, and Sydney. Interns work on a hybrid basis - some days you'll work from the office and some days you'll work from home. Managers and their organization will establish the frequency you'll go into the office to meet priorities.

### What is the best way to connect with the Okta Recruiting team and get notifications on our roles?

The best way to stay connected with our team is by joining our Talent Community which can be found at the top of this page or our careers page.

results.title: Okta Inc. - Investor Relations
results.content:
Okta Logo
Okta Logo

### Corporate Overview

Okta is The World’s Identity Company™. We secure identity, so everyone is
free to safely use any technology. Our customer and workforce solutions
empower businesses and developers to use the power of identity to drive
security, efficiencies, and success — all while protecting their users,
employees, and partners. Learn why the world’s leading brands trust Okta for
authentication, authorization, and more at
okta.com.

### Dig into our Data

Familiarize yourself with trends in the market by using our Businesses @
Work Dashboard to view Okta’s anonymized customer data from our network of
thousands of companies and millions of daily authentications and
verifications from countries around the world.

Learn More
